scripts.prebuild: bash scripts/download-pocketbase.sh && bash scripts/setup-inference.sh && bun build src/bun/server.ts --outfile vendor/server.js --target bun --minify
scripts.prebuild:release: bash scripts/download-pocketbase.sh && bash scripts/setup-inference.sh && bun build src/bun/server.ts --outfile vendor/server.js --target bun --minify
